qualification_sampled_worker_rss_note: Maximum aggregate from a recorded point-in-time process snapshot; the runner did not persist a continuous peak-RSS counter.
observed_cpu_utilization_note: Sixteen workers were observed near one CPU each; the runner did not persist a time-integrated CPU utilization series.
projection_policy: Historical linear projection only; it does not authorize or recommend full production. A later reviewed staged-production preregistration may replace the 118784-pair plan.
